problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to it, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
